action_set_definitions.name: get_building_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves general information about the current building and the phase of the inspection.

action_set_definitions.name: list_components_by_location
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all penetrations and assemblies within a specific zone and wall segment.

action_set_definitions.name: get_component_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed technical specifications for a specific component, including safety flags and UL system requirements.

component_id.description: The unique internal ID of the component.

action_set_definitions.name: query_registry_violations
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the building registry for violation entries based on status and component nomenclature.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_destructive_test
action_set_definitions.description: Applies a destructive depth gauge to a sealant to measure compliance. Returns measurement and pass/fail status against specified UL criteria.

component_id.description: The ID of the component to test.

target_ul_system.description: The UL system code to validate against (e.g., 'W-J-1067').

action_set_definitions.name: update_registry_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a specific violation entry in the registry.

violation_id.description: The ID of the violation record.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_expanded_sampling
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates an ASTM E2174 expanded sampling protocol for a failed penetration.

component_id.description: The ID of the failed component.

protocol_name.description: The sampling protocol to use (e.g., 'ASTM E2174').

state_description.building_id: Unique identifier for the building being inspected.
state_description.inspection_phase: Current stage of the compliance process (e.g., INITIAL, FOLLOW_UP, FINAL).
state_description.compliance_score: Internal aggregate percentage of building compliance (0-100).
state_description.active_violations: List of current code violations detected but not yet rectified.
state_description.inspected_zones: List of building zones or rooms already processed by the inspector.
state_description.safety_hazards_present: Internal flag indicating if the environment currently poses a risk to the inspector.
